sourcesContent:
import React, { useMemo } from "react";
import {
  SafeAreaView,
  View,
  Text,
  StyleSheet,
  TouchableOpacity,
  ScrollView,
} from "react-native";
import { useNavigation } from "@react-navigation/native";
import { useTranslation } from "../i18n";

const GREEN = "#2F7D3A";
const DARK_GREEN = "#0F3C2F";
const BG = "#F5F5F5";
const INK = "#111827";
const MUTED = "#6B7280";

function Card({ title, icon, children }) {
  return (
    <View style={S.card}>
      <View style={S.cardHead}>
        <View style={S.cardAccent} />
        <Text style={S.cardIcon}>{icon}</Text>
        <Text style={S.cardTitle}>{title}</Text>
      </View>
      <View style={S.cardBody}>{children}</View>
    </View>
  );
}

function Row({ label, value }) {
  return (
    <View style={S.row}>
      <Text style={S.rowLabel}>{label}</Text>
      <View style={S.rowValueWrap}>
        <Text style={S.rowValue} numberOfLines={2}>
          {value}
        </Text>
      </View>
    </View>
  );
}

export default function OfficialControlScreen() {
  const navigation = useNavigation();
  const { t } = useTranslation();

  // ✅ Demo data (later replace with API)
  const data = useMemo(
    () => ({
      plate: "CE 458-Y",
      brandModel: "Toyota Yaris (Sedan)",
      owner: "NGOUMOU Jean-Pierre",

      licenceNumber: "CUY-2026-TX-8842",
      validity: "01/01/2026 au 31/12/2026",
      zone: "Yaoundé Urbain",
      doorNumber: "1055-B",

      driverName: "FOUDA MEKONGO Christian",
      permitNumber: "04/1055/B/2018",
      category: "B",
      cni: "112455987",

      insuranceCompany: "ACTIVA Assurance",
      insuranceExpiry: "15/06/2026",
      insuranceStatus: "VALIDE",
    }),
    []
  );

  return (
    <SafeAreaView style={S.safe}>
      <ScrollView contentContainerStyle={S.scroll} showsVerticalScrollIndicator={false}>
        {/* Top bar */}
        <View style={S.topRow}>
          <TouchableOpacity style={S.backBtn} onPress={() => navigation.goBack()}>
            <Text style={S.backIcon}>‹</Text>
            <Text style={S.backText}>{t("common.back")}</Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>
        </View>

        {/* Status pill */}
        <View style={S.statusWrap}>
          <View style={S.statusPill}>
            <View style={S.statusDot} />
            <Text style={S.statusText}>{t("official.statusAuthorized")}</Text>
          </View>
        </View>

        {/* Plate */}
        <View style={S.plateWrap}>
          <View style={S.plateBox}>
            <Text style={S.plateText}>{data.plate}</Text>
          </View>
        </View>

        {/* Cards */}
        <Card title={t("official.vehicle.title")} icon="🪪">
          <Row label={t("official.vehicle.plate")} value={data.plate} />
          <Row label={t("official.vehicle.model")} value={data.brandModel} />
          <Row label={t("official.vehicle.owner")} value={data.owner} />
        </Card>

        <Card title={t("official.licence.title")} icon="📄">
          <Row label={t("official.licence.number")} value={data.licenceNumber} />
          <Row label={t("official.licence.validity")} value={data.validity} />
          <Row label={t("official.licence.zone")} value={data.zone} />
          <Row label={t("official.licence.doorNumber")} value={data.doorNumber} />
        </Card>

        <Card title={t("official.driver.title")} icon="🧑🏽‍✈️">
          <Row label={t("official.driver.name")} value={data.driverName} />
          <Row label={t("official.driver.permit")} value={data.permitNumber} />
          <Row label={t("official.driver.category")} value={data.category} />
          <Row label={t("official.driver.cni")} value={data.cni} />
        </Card>

        <Card title={t("official.insurance.title")} icon="🛡️">
          <Row label={t("official.insurance.company")} value={data.insuranceCompany} />
          <Row label={t("official.insurance.expiry")} value={data.insuranceExpiry} />
          <Row label={t("official.insurance.status")} value={data.insuranceStatus} />
        </Card>

        <View style={{ height: 18 }} />
      </ScrollView>
    </SafeAreaView>
  );
}

const S = StyleSheet.create({
  safe: { flex: 1, backgroundColor: BG },
  scroll: { paddingHorizontal: 18, paddingTop: 14, paddingBottom: 24 },

  /* Top */
  topRow: { width: "100%", flexDirection: "row", justifyContent: "flex-start" },
  backBtn: {
    height: 42,
    paddingHorizontal: 16,
    borderRadius: 22,
    backgroundColor: DARK_GREEN,
    flexDirection: "row",
    alignItems: "center",
    gap: 8,
    shadowColor: "#000",
    shadowOpacity: 0.14,
    shadowRadius: 14,
    shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: 10 },
    elevation: 6,
  },
  backIcon: { color: "#fff", fontSize: 22, fontWeight: "900", marginTop: -2 },
  backText: { color: "#fff", fontSize: 16, fontWeight: "800" },

  /* Status */
  statusWrap: { marginTop: 14, alignItems: "center" },
  statusPill: {
    width: "88%",
    height: 48,
    borderRadius: 24,
    backgroundColor: "#DCEBDD",
    borderWidth: 1,
    borderColor: "rgba(47,125,58,0.35)",
    flexDirection: "row",
    alignItems: "center",
    justifyContent: "center",
    gap: 12,
  },
  statusDot: { width: 12, height: 12, borderRadius: 6, backgroundColor: GREEN },
  statusText: { color: GREEN, fontSize: 22, fontWeight: "900", letterSpacing: 0.6 },

  /* Plate */
  plateWrap: { marginTop: 12, alignItems: "center" },
  plateBox: {
    width: "78%",
    height: 58,
    borderRadius: 18,
    borderWidth: 4,
    borderColor: GREEN,
    backgroundColor: "#fff",
    alignItems: "center",
    justifyContent: "center",
    shadowColor: "#000",
    shadowOpacity: 0.06,
    shadowRadius: 14,
    shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: 10 },
    elevation: 3,
  },
  plateText: { fontSize: 34, fontWeight: "900", color: INK, letterSpacing: 1.2 },

  /* Card */
  card: {
    marginTop: 16,
    borderRadius: 22,
    backgroundColor: "#fff",
    padding: 16,
    shadowColor: "#000",
    shadowOpacity: 0.10,
    shadowRadius: 18,
    shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: 12 },
    elevation: 6,
    borderWidth: 1,
    borderColor: "rgba(0,0,0,0.05)",
  },
  cardHead: {
    flexDirection: "row",
    alignItems: "center",
    gap: 10,
    paddingBottom: 12,
    borderBottomWidth: 1,
    borderBottomColor: "rgba(17,24,39,0.08)",
    position: "relative",
  },
  cardAccent: {
    position: "absolute",
    left: 0,
    top: 6,
    width: 6,
    height: 20,
    borderRadius: 3,
    backgroundColor: GREEN,
  },
  cardIcon: { fontSize: 18, marginLeft: 10 },
  cardTitle: {
    fontSize: 16,
    fontWeight: "900",
    color: INK,
    letterSpacing: 1,
    textTransform: "uppercase",
  },
  cardBody: { paddingTop: 10 },

  /* Rows */
  row: {
    flexDirection: "row",
    alignItems: "center",
    justifyContent: "space-between",
    paddingVertical: 12,
    borderBottomWidth: 1,
    borderBottomColor: "rgba(17,24,39,0.06)",
  },
  rowLabel: { color: MUTED, fontSize: 16, fontWeight: "700" },
  rowValueWrap: {
    maxWidth: "55%",
    paddingVertical: 6,
    paddingHorizontal: 10,
    borderRadius: 12,
    backgroundColor: "rgba(47,125,58,0.06)",
  },
  rowValue: { color: INK, fontSize: 16, fontWeight: "900", textAlign: "right" },
});
